analysis: PCOS cross-space phenotyping revised, reviewer-safe pipeline
primary_model_selection: pre-specified grid: gmm_diag/kmeans/ward, k=2-4, chosen by bootstrap stability, silhouette, cluster size, uncertainty
model_qc_pass: bootstrap ARI median >=0.60, min cluster fraction >=0.10, posterior uncertainty <=0.35 when available
imputation_policy: complete-case is primary; imputed analyses are sensitivity only; imputers use variables within the same biological space only; imputation-induced agreement is flagged when abs(ARI_imputed-ARI_completecase)>0.30
